intentionalChanges: D5: upstream fetch (requestJson) now has a default 10s timeout (MIVO_EAGLE_TIMEOUT_MS overrides). Timeout surfaces as the same offline shape (502 / connected:false) as a connection failure, just bounded in time. Tested with a slow server + 50ms timeout.
preservedQuirks: D4: error shapes remain inconsistent — status=JSON, folders/tags/assets=502 plain text, file=404 plain text, most without Content-Type. Not normalized (no new envelope).
D6: no method guard — app.all returns the same response for any method.
SSRF boundary preserved: host fixed to MIVO_EAGLE_API_URL; all routes hardcoded strings.
frameworkDiffs: D4 content-type: @hono/node-server forces `text/plain; charset=UTF-8` on no-Content-Type responses (server.js:382). BFF real-HTTP 502/404 plain-text → content-type=text/plain; charset=UTF-8 (dev: null). In-memory app.request preserves null. Framework diff, not a shape change.

summary: Local Eagle app proxy. Host is fixed to MIVO_EAGLE_API_URL (default 127.0.0.1:41595); routes hardcoded (SSRF bounded by construction). NO upstream timeout. Error shapes are INCONSISTENT across sub-routes.
dispatchRef: L1445-L1575 (six sub-routes); eagleApi L1033-L1043; eagleApiBase L9

methods.other: DISCREPANCY — no method guard on any eagle sub-route. Non-GET returns the same response as GET.

subRoutes.note: Offline is 200 (not 5xx) with connected:false. Content-Type: application/json set in both branches.

subRoutes.discrepancy: Error response has NO Content-Type header and plain-text body (not JSON). Inconsistent with status sub-route.

subRoutes.note: Tags normalized: string tags → {id:name,name}; object tags → {id,name,count?}.
Defaults limit=80 offset=0; filters by imageExtensions (L1550).
On thumbnail read failure → tries original file → else SVG fallback. Never 5xx.

scenarios.name: Eagle offline (all sub-routes)
scenarios.condition: Eagle app not running / MIVO_EAGLE_API_URL unreachable
scenarios.expected: status→200 {connected:false,...}; folders/tags/assets→502 plain text (no Content-Type); :id/file→404 plain text (no Content-Type); :id/thumbnail→200 SVG fallback (image/svg+xml, no-store)
scenarios.sourceRef: requestJson L186-L190 throws on fetch failure; per-route catch blocks

scenarios.name: no upstream timeout
scenarios.expected: requestJson (L186-L190) and eagle fetches have NO timeout — a hanging Eagle API hangs the request indefinitely
scenarios.discrepancy: Plan §6.1: '现状无上游超时——BFF 补默认超时并记录为有意变更'. Confirmed: no timeout anywhere in eagle path. BFF MUST add a default timeout (intended-change, explicitly allowed by plan).

scenarios.name: SSRF boundary
scenarios.expected: host fixed to eagleApiBase; all routes hardcoded strings — no user-controlled route or host. SSRF bounded by construction.
scenarios.sourceRef: eagleApiBase L9; eagleApi L1033-L1035 (new URL(route, eagleApiBase) with hardcoded route)

scenarios.name: non-GET method → same response (no guard)
scenarios.discrepancy: No 405 on any eagle sub-route. Same intended-change candidate as local-assets.

scenarios.name: error shape inconsistency
scenarios.sourceRef: status JSON L1462-L1469 vs folders plain L1479-L1480 vs tags plain L1500-L1501 vs assets plain L1571-L1572 vs file 404 plain L1531-L1532
scenarios.discrepancy: Plan §6.1 '错误 shape 同上' (referring to {error} envelope) is NOT applied to eagle. Eagle errors are plain-text + missing Content-Type (except status). P1-c must preserve these exact shapes (plan: no new envelope); BFF normalization is a separate later PR.
